{
  "clinical_story": "James has been experiencing significant health challenges, with a recent BNP test showing a critically high level of 2331.1 pg/mL, indicating worsening heart failure. He has also missed his BMP monitoring for 32 days, which is crucial for assessing his kidney function and potassium levels. Additionally, he has been skipping doses of Lisinopril 3–4 times a week, which is vital for managing his hypertension and heart failure. The most urgent concern is his high BNP level, which may require immediate attention.",
